title: Emu/Tern Charge Case battery status
scenario: Verify Charge Case battery level UI behavior on Home screen across different earbud presence and CC open/closed states
steps: Place both earbuds in the Charge Case (CC) and open the CC.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
Remove one or both earbuds from the CC while keeping the CC open.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
Close the CC with no earbuds inside.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
Open the CC, place one earbud inside, and close the CC.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
Open the CC, place both earbuds inside, and close the CC.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
expected: - When both earbuds are in the CC and the CC is opened: battery level is present, green, shows the correct percentage, and is centralized below the earbuds' battery levels.\n- When one or both earbuds are removed from the CC (CC still open): battery icon is greyed out and shows the last known battery level (%).\n- When the CC is closed with no earbuds, one earbud, or both earbuds inside: battery icon is greyed out and shows the last known battery level (%).
